description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service running in experimental mode. Add a before_script that makes rootfs/app-entrypoint.sh, rootfs/custom.sh and rootfs/init.sh executable and logs in to the GitLab Container Registry with $CI_REGISTRY_USER and $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD. Define a single stage called build and a job named build-master that runs only on the master branch; in this job execute docker build --squash --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:master" . followed by docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:master". No caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are required.
